---
kind: task_template
name: Weekly Org Hygiene Review
description: Weekly review of reporting-line integrity, paused-state discipline, recurring task coverage, and artifact drift
schema: agentcompanies/v1
assignee: chief-of-staff
project: studio-os
recurring: true
---

Review once per week:

- reporting lines
- duplicate or drifted roles
- recurring task assignment integrity
- comments-only transitions
- stale issues beyond policy
- canonical artifact usage across lanes
- instruction and skill drift that creates role ambiguity

## Required Output

Leave behind:

- one org hygiene report
- one escalation list for any critical structural drift
